holdings.infoBox: PIEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 8.18%, ASML Holding at 6.42%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.36%, Teck Resources at 4.55%, and AIB Group at 3.76%.

overview.description: The Principal International Equity ETF (PIEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in stocks of companies outside the United States. Using proprietary fundamental research, the fund adviser surfaces companies considered underestimated by the market. PIEQ was launched on Nov 5, 2024 and is issued by Principal.

data.title: Principal® Launches International Equity ETF
data.text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal Asset Management℠ announced the launch of the International Equity ETF (PIEQ). This ETF will be a large-cap portfolio managed by the Principal equities tea...
